scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner interior matching image1 layout. Dark-complexioned Latino male dishwasher (image2) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script blinks slowly at the morning light, holding a mop bucket with a dazed expression, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in cream cable-knit sweater and dark wash jeans who stands nearby facing him. Behind the cash register: male clerk (image4) in white button-up shirt and black pants. On the diner floor serving tables: blonde female waitress (image5) in ruby red blouse, black pencil skirt, and white waist apron. Customers seated in red booths. Warm morning light. No customers behind counter. Note: image2 and image4 are two completely different people.
